title: Encrypted Files, Streams, Chunks, and Format Evolution · Concurrent Code Workshop
summary: A product-security pair incrementally builds seekable authenticated backup container, changes one attacker-controlled input, and keeps earlier Go, accessibility, secret-lifecycle, testing, and evidence invariants active. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of seekable authenticated backup container while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define a bounded versioned file envelope with magic, suite, key reference, KDF parameters, nonce base, chunk policy, metadata, and authenticated lengths.
Derive unique per-chunk nonces and associated data from immutable file identity, epoch, chunk index, length, and final marker.
Authenticate chunk position, total or final state, and file identity to reject deletion, duplication, insertion, reordering, and splicing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go File Envelope Format
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop cryptographic engineering team handles case 1686 during a replicated device restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a bounded authenticated chunk format with final-state and partial-output cleanup evidence; preserve accessible status, non-color meaning, keyboard operation, error recovery, and secret-safe diagnostics; then swap the role, tenant, recipient, algorithm, or context and prove domain separation. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go File Envelope Format.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for define a bounded versioned file envelope with magic, suite, key reference, kdf parameters, nonce base, chunk policy, metadata, and authenticated lengths. For Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go File Envelope Format, keep Crypto Go File Envelope Format connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
